business_criticality.rationale: High criticality — HR and payroll data

key_risk_factors: Windows Server 2012 EOL creates OS-level security exposure for HR/payroll data
.NET Core version ambiguity — may require full framework upgrade
Hybrid AWS + On-premise deployment complicates migration
SQL Server 2019 in extended support — license cost with EOL in 2030
HR data sensitivity requires careful compliance planning during migration
modernization_notes: HRApp-004 requires a carefully sequenced modernization due to high data sensitivity and hybrid deployment. OS and IIS upgrades are critical first steps. .NET version must be clarified before planning application modernization.
